data.body: When an interactive agent exits cleanly without producing a valid knot transition, send one follow-up nudge in the same session telling it to perform the step-closing action from the claim prompt such as next or rollback. If the nudge still fails, keep the existing rollback and alternate-agent recovery behavior. Also count the unrecovered outcome as an agent failure in lease/diagnostic reporting.
data.title: Recover incomplete interactive knot transitions
